steps.title: Find the area scale factor
steps.content:
For similar solids, surface areas scale by the square of the linear scale factor. Compare prism $Y$ to prism $X$.
$$\frac{1{,}550}{62}=25$$

steps.title: Convert to volume scale
steps.content:
Since the surface area scale factor is $25$, the linear scale factor is $5$. Volumes scale by the cube of the linear scale factor.
$$5^3=125$$

steps.title: Find the total volume
steps.content:
Prism $Y$ has $125$ times the volume of prism $X$, so divide to find prism $X$ and then add.
$$\frac{1{,}500}{125}=12$$
$$1{,}500+12=1{,}512$$
The answer is 1512.
